$comment: D-EXAMPLES-RUNNER-MULTI-ARTIFACT (c171): the FIRST multi-artifact corpus example. Each target's `dependsOn` builds `lib.c` (exporting dss_lib_answer) into a STATIC LIBRARY via the c171-D `-staticlib` format (a `.lib` on pe64 / a `.a` on elf64), then builds `main.c` (extern dss_lib_answer) RESOLVING against it via --resolve-library -> the c169/c170 COFF / c165 ELF static-link pulls the member into a SELF-CONTAINED exec -> exit 42. Witnesses, at the corpus tier + end-to-end: the c171 dependsOn runner capability, the c171-D staticlib driver surface, and the static-link pull/merge. PE RUNS natively on the Windows gate; ELF RUNS on the ubuntu leg / under WSL (SkippedCrossHost elsewhere, where the BUILD still gives structural coverage).
